subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! This earthly world, this dusty ephemeral abode, is but the nest of terrestrial birds and the den of bats [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی این جهان ترابی و خاکدان فانی آشیان مرغ خاکیست و لانه خفاش
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
